name: Non-Existent User Login Attempt Detected
description: Detects multiple failed SSH login attempts for non-existent users within a short time frame, indicating potential brute-force activity.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the last failed login attempt in the aggregated sequence.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address from which the failed login attempts originated.

parameters.name: user_name
parameters.description: The non-existent username that was attempted during the login, if available in logs.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The process name associated with the login attempt (sshd).

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Event ID for failed login attempts (e.g., 514, or specific to the Unix system).

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The number of failed login attempts from the source IP within the specified timeframe.
